example.en: She was so sad that she couldn't speak.
example.es: Ella estaba tan triste que no podía hablar.
example.vi: Cô ấy buồn đến nỗi không thể nói chuyện.

definitions.en: to the extent that; so much that
definitions.es: hasta el punto de; tanto que

translation.en: She cried to the point of not stopping.

exampleSentencesTranslated: The weather is so hot today so...that I don't even want to go outside.
You laughed loudly so...that everyone in the room turned to look.
She worked hard so...that she forgot to eat lunch.
notes_md:
**đến nỗi** means *so… that…* — it shows a strong result caused by something.

It links a cause (often an adjective or verb) to an extreme result. The feeling or action is so intense that something else happens.


It’s stronger and more dramatic than just “rất” (very). Think of it as pushing things to a noticeable consequence.

exampleSentences: Trời hôm nay nóng đến nỗi anh không muốn ra ngoài.
Em cười lớn đến nỗi mọi người trong phòng đều quay lại nhìn.
Chị làm việc chăm chỉ đến nỗi quên cả ăn trưa.

translation.en: She cried to the point of not stopping.
